description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring a minimalist design. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, complemented by large windows and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The house includes a driveway leading to a garage, a small front yard with a palm tree, and a rear garden area with landscaping elements. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms and a central corridor. The use of glass and open courtyards enhances natural light and ventilation throughout the structure. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on functional outdoor and indoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, large windows, and landscaped front and rear yards. The design is minimalist and open-plan, with a garage and prominent use of glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a palm tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open-plan interior, large windows, and rear garden with landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, open courtyard, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible garden elements, windows, and the overall length of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door adjacent to the garage, with a paved approach and minimal decorative elements.
